"{name}" ({ip}) misafir listesinden kaldirilsin mi?

Hemen gecerli olur: acik baglantilari kesilir ve sonraki tum istekleri reddedilir.
guests.confirmRemoveSelf:
"{name}" ({ip}) SENIN KENDI IP'in.

Kaldirirsan bu baglanti hemen kesilir ve yonetici ana bilgisayardan seni yeniden onaylayana kadar disarida kalirsin. Yine de kaldirilsin mi?

understanding.title: Anlama
understanding.prefill: Claude'dan once ne anladigini yazmasini iste
understanding.prefillPrompt: Istegimi yapmadan once, ne anladigini bir OpenSpec degisikliginin `proposal.md` dosyasinda ozetle — hedef, atacagin somut adimlar ve varsayimlarin (henuz bir degisiklik yoksa once `openspec new change <name>` calistir). Istek degisirse guncel tut ve devam etmeden once onaylamami bekle.
feature.kickoffPrompt: I want you to start a new feature. Make sure you are on the main branch synced with origin/main, then create a new feature branch. Start an OpenSpec change for it — run `openspec new change <name>` (or use /opsx propose) and draft its proposal. This is the feature we will be working on:
prompts.builtin.close.label: Tamamlanan ozelligi kapat
prompts.builtin.close: it works. Tick the remaining items in the change's tasks.md, run `openspec validate <change> --strict`, then `openspec archive <change>` to fold its delta into the living baseline. Then merge to main and make sure main is synced with origin.
prompts.builtin.close.legacy: it works. update our entry in plan.md . remove it from Active feature plans to recently shipped. merge to master - and make sure that master is synced with origin.
prompts.builtin.evaluate.label: Secenekleri degerlendir
prompts.builtin.evaluate: Do you have only one idea/approach to this problem? If there are many approaches you can think of I want you to create a comparison table in the change's design.md where you will compare these approaches across a couple of dimensions. For example, difficulty of development, risk of development and so on. could you do that?
prompts.builtin.evaluate.legacy: Do you have only one idea/approach to this problem? If there are many approaches you can think of I want you to create a table in our plan where you will compare these approaches across a couple of dimensions. For example, difficulty of development, risk of development and so on. could you do that?
prompts.builtin.docsimplify.label: Dokumani daha anlasilir yap (diyagramsiz)
prompts.builtin.docsimplify: The document is bloated right now. I want you to use appropriate principles for making it simpler, but not losing any important information. Use the principle of progressive disclosure - if the document covers many responsibilities, then try and refactor responsibilities into their own subfiles, that are only referenced by this document. You are trying to optimize for understanding of the operator. When you write the document - the goal should always be the most clarity for the reader.
prompts.builtin.walloftext.label: Metin duvari uyarisi
prompts.builtin.walloftext: You sent me a wall of text. Can you just give it to me concisely - what do you need from me. are you asking me a question? are you asking me for permission? please just tell me what you want from me concisely
prompts.builtin.understandingapp.label: anlama uygulamasi
prompts.builtin.understandingapp: please serve me the understanding in the understanding app
feature.kickoffPrompt.legacy: I want you to start a new feature. make sure you are on the main branch that is synced with origin/main. create a new feature branch. Make a new entry in the Active feature plans section in plans.md . This is the feature we will be working on:
understanding.prefillPrompt.legacy: Isteklerimi yapmadan once, ne anladigini once depo kokundeki `understanding.md` dosyasina markdown olarak yaz: hedefin kisa bir ozeti, yapacagin somut seyler ve varsayimlarin. Istek degisirse guncel tut ve devam etmeden once onaylamami bekle.

prompts.empty: Henuz ozel istem yok. Asagidan ekle.
prompts.paramsNone: Alan yok — doldurulacak alan icin {{ad}} ekleyin.

plans.noSteps: Henuz adim yok. Ilkini asagidan ekle.
plans.stepDetailsPlaceholder: Detaylar — bu adim icin gonderilen istem
plans.stepEmpty: Bir ad, detay veya beklenen sonuc ekle.
plans.pasteHint: Bir blok yapistir — PROMPT:, DETAILS:, EXPECTED RESULT: ile baslayan satirlar adim olur.

DETAILS: Modul iskeletini olustur…
EXPECTED RESULT: Dosyalar derlenir, testler gecer

PROMPT: …
notes.canvasPlaceholder: Karalama tuvalin — sonra plana donusturecegin calisma notlarini buraya yaz. Buyutmek icin koseden surukle. Otomatik kaydeder.
localapp.formBody: {name} hangi portta calisiyor? Yerel sekme onu harness uzerinden sunar, yani giris yapabildigin her yerden erisilir — ama asla genel ana sayfada gorunmez.
localapp.howTitle: Burada bir web uygulamasi mi gostereceksin?
localapp.howIntro: Cogu uygulamanin bu sekmede gorunmek icin kucuk bir tek seferlik ayar gerekir (UI ve API tek bir loopback portunda, goreli URL'lerle). Bunu senin icin bir ajan yapabilir:
localapp.howStep1: Claude Web deposunda (bu uygulamanin kendi projesi) bir ajan ac.
localapp.howStep2: Gostermek istedigin web uygulamasinin tam yolunu ona ver.
localapp.howStep3: Uygulamayi Yerel sekme uzerinden gosterilebilecek sekilde yeniden yapilandirmasini iste — sonra verdigi portu yukariya gir.
localapp.howNote: Burada zaten gosterilen uygulamalar tam olarak boyle ayarlandi.
expose.error: Sunum kontrolu calistirilamadi. Lutfen tekrar dene.
expose.freshStale: Tarayicin gomulu icerigin eski bir kopyasini gosteriyor.

expose.freshBlankDetail: Sunucu guncel surumu ({server}) sunarken gomulu icerik bos goruntulendi. Bu bir tarayici onbellek sorunu, urun sorunu degil.
localapp.noProject: Once bir proje sec — Yerel sekme secili projenin uygulamasini gosterir.
localapp.basicEmpty: Bu projenin henuz gosterilecek calisan bir uygulamasi yok.
